emails.subject: Dynegydirect
emails.body: Tana Do you know what the status of adding Coal to Dynegydirect is? Who do I need to talk to? I thought we were supposed to get some thing from Dynegy on this. Thanks for the update. Hope all is warm in Calgary. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Dynegydirect
emails.body: Re: Dynegydirect You need to talk to Stephanie Sever at x33465. Mark Greenberg@ENRON 03/14/01 05:58 PM
